column1: # Partition layout for the demo firmware.
# The important part for the audio workflow is the Serial Peripheral Interface
# Flash File System (SPIFFS) partition at the end:
# it stores the converted .u8 tracks that the console lists and transmits.
# Small key-value storage used by the Espressif IoT Development Framework
# Physical-layer (PHY) calibration data expected by the Wi-Fi/radio stack.
# Main application image flashed by idf.py / PlatformIO upload.
# SPIFFS image built from data/ and uploaded with the uploadfs target.
